required_preferences.fact: Hosts Sunday dinners with his wife only — rarely includes extended family due to their relocation out of state

supersedes.fact: Hosts his daughter and family for Sunday dinners every week — never misses unless they're out of town

required_preferences.fact: Shares silent reading time with his grandson at every sleepover — avoids reading aloud due to difficulty hearing and following along accurately

supersedes.fact: Reads aloud with his grandson at every sleepover — never lets him just play video games during those visits

required_preferences.fact: Limits computer time after 8pm and avoids screens entirely an hour before bed
Schedules all follow-up audiology appointments promptly and tracks hearing aid adjustments as a routine health task
Prefers to attend book auctions and estate sales virtually or with wheelchair assistance when available, avoiding venues requiring extended walking or standing
Adds a flat-rate shipping charge to every order regardless of book value — no longer offers free shipping for select high-value books

persona: A retired teacher supplementing income by reselling vintage books online
